mapper.insert: insert into aiw_order (biz_id, order_no, idempotency_key, user_biz_id, portfolio_biz_id, product_biz_id, channel_code, order_side, order_type, currency, requested_price, requested_quantity, requested_amount, executed_quantity, executed_amount, fee_amount, status, external_order_id, reject_code, reject_message, submitted_at, completed_at, version, created_at, updated_at, created_by, is_deleted) values (#{bizId}, #{orderNo}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{userBizId}, #{portfolioBizId}, #{productBizId}, #{channelCode}, #{orderSide}, #{orderType}, #{currency}, #{requestedPrice}, #{requestedQuantity}, #{requestedAmount}, #{executedQuantity}, #{executedAmount}, #{feeAmount}, #{status}, #{externalOrderId}, #{rejectCode}, #{rejectMessage}, #{submittedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{deleted}) on duplicate key update executed_quantity = values(executed_quantity), executed_amount = values(executed_amount), fee_amount = values(fee_amount), status = values(status), external_order_id = values(external_order_id), reject_code = values(reject_code), reject_message = values(reject_message), submitted_at = values(submitted_at), completed_at = values(completed_at), version = values(version), updated_at = values(updated_at)
